message.content:
@startuml
title Request Order Change

actor Buyer
participant "Grower" as Grower #white;#black;line:black;text:green;;line:red
actor Manager
control System
database db

Buyer -> System : Make **Order** __Change__ *Request*
System -> db : Insert **Order\nChange Request**
Manager <- System : Email **Order\nChange Request**


frame Confirmation process {
    note over Buyerrrrr,Growwweeeeee \nConfirm details of ***Order***\n_Change_ _Request_ over email
    
}



note right of 10 
Nothing to do here unless we add a  
**Change Request** editing function   
end note 

footer <u>Footer</u>: This is footer text 


@enduml
